review_text: COMPLETE RIP OFF !!!!!

This app has such potential but it is FILLED with issues and mechanics that makes no sense and take the fun out of it. Some issues with the app are straight up UNNACCEPTABLE for an application and should be fixed ASAP but for some reasons are ongoing for months it is unnacceptable that your app messes with my Spotify. 100% unacceptable. The fact that the app can't stay open in the background is such a HUGE flaw as well. Plus the huge amount of flawed mechanics that take away the fun

Reported spoofer with multiple accounts, provided locations and videos link of gyms. 4 months later, not reviewed. Contacted support again said will escalate issue and gave evidence of spoofer in action. 1 month later, nothing happens. Contacted support again, gave me same scripted response. Their fair play policy is only for show. This means go ahead and be one too. FYI the spoofer grown 12 acounts since mid 2025. So safe to have 12 accounts!

I've always loved the pokemon games, and I've watched the anime since I was 4 years old. It's awesome that there's a mobile game for it that's so fun. The AR features would be awesome if they didn't lag so much. Love the rewards and events, they're amazing. I go on walks in the real world to catch lots of pokemon, and then I claim so many rewards when I get home! It's a great game if you need motivation to get outside more.

Overall I really enjoy the game. It is a good way to learn more about pokemon and how to fight with them as well. While I do really enjoy the game, there are a few reasons why I gave it 4 stars. Due to word limit, it will have to be brief. - Randomly freezes as you catch pokemon - some raid pokemon are insanely hard to catch and seems like they want you to buy passes to catch them. - Storage space is easy to fill. To get more (choosing to buy) the amount you get is so small.

Most issues in the app from years ago still exist in the app today. Constant raid problems, cheaters in pvp, raid passes getting used up even when the game crashes or when everyone leaves. The only reason they don't fix it is so they can get people to spend more and the recent 30th anniversary event was awful and only good for taking pictures of legendaries you can't catch, not to mention the reduced shiny chance. It's like the devs could not commit to the anniversary spirit.

Newest season (March 2026) has the trade window lose its back put button and if you want to confirm the stats of your pokemon during a trade, it freezes when you appraise on the first checking out button. Fix this, its annoying, frustrating and not user friendly for trades.

Without a doubt the worst, least enjoyable Pokemon game ever made, let's begin: - Playing in a country that isn't active in this game/has no players, makes the game extremely difficult, as raids cannot me done, can't partake in events and thus no legendary Pokemon. (Thus, unplayable) - Remote raid passes are a terrible system that clearly shows the greed of Niantic, as they will expire even if a raid doesn't succeed/glitches out. Plenty more to say but Playstore reviews have a text cap... :/

Maybe a trading with NPCs so we can actually get the Pokémon we want or a global trade system with players!!?
